description: Minimal default capabilities. All JS-invokable Tauri plugins have been removed — the frontend interacts with the embedded browser exclusively through the custom `browser_*` commands defined in src-tauri/src/lib.rs, which enforce URL scheme and per-origin isolation in Rust. If you add a feature that needs the fs/store/shell/dialog plugins, re-add the plugin in Cargo.toml + lib.rs, then grant the narrowest possible scope here.
